name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry in Phoenix, AZ offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold buying, and discounted pre-owned merchandise as part of the EZPAWN national chain.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix is a branded location within the EZPAWN family of stores, one of the larger national pawn shop chains operating across the United States. The store serves the central Phoenix community with extended weekday and Saturday hours (9am–7pm) and limited Sunday hours, positioning itself as an accessible option for residents needing quick cash or affordable merchandise.

The store's core offering is collateral-based pawn loans: customers bring in items of value and receive cash on the spot, with the option to reclaim items by repaying the loan plus fees. Beyond pawn lending, the location buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail, operates an online shop with daily inventory updates, and offers auto loans and firearms sales. A proprietary EZ+ Rewards program allows customers to manage pawns and layaways digitally and earn points on eligible transactions.

What sets this location apart from independent pawn shops is the EZPAWN infrastructure behind it: a branded instant quote tool for electronics, a structured Jewelry VIP Program offering guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning, a Product Protection Plan for purchased merchandise, and third-party "Take Today" financing for customers who want to take items home and pay over time. These add-ons reflect a chain-level investment in customer retention tools that smaller operators typically lack.

Honestly, this is a high-cost credit option. Pawn loans are subject to fees and terms that are not disclosed on the website — customers must visit in-store to learn rates, which is a common industry practice but limits comparison shopping. Online payments are explicitly unavailable in Arizona. Auto loan terms are not described at all. For consumers in a genuine cash emergency with an item to collateralize, it can serve a real need, but borrowing costs are almost certainly higher than personal loans or credit union alternatives.
pros: Part of the national EZPAWN chain with standardized processes and branded protections
Extended hours Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, with Sunday availability (12pm–5pm)
Online shop with daily new arrivals enables remote browsing before visiting
Instant Quote tool gives electronics valuations online before stepping inside
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down payment required
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts and free stone replacement
EZ+ Rewards program lets customers manage pawns and layaways online and earn points
cons: Online pawn payments are explicitly unavailable in Arizona, limiting remote account management
Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website — requires in-store visit to compare costs
Auto loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements are entirely absent from the site
Sunday hours are significantly reduced (12pm–5pm vs. 9am–7pm weekdays)
"Take Today" financing is managed by unnamed third-party partners with no disclosed terms
best_for: Phoenix residents needing same-day cash who own electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to collateralize
Bargain shoppers seeking pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, or gear at 25–70% off retail
People looking to sell or get quotes on gold and diamond jewelry quickly
Consumers who want structured layaway as an alternative to credit for purchases
diagnosis: Best suited for Phoenix residents in a cash crunch who have a pawnable asset — electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms — and need money the same day without a credit check. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are deliberately opaque online and are typically among the most expensive forms of short-term borrowing; anyone with access to a credit union PAL or personal loan should compare those first.
services: Online shop with daily new inventory
Take Today third-party financing (take home now, pay over time)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, cleaning)
Product Protection Plan for purchased merchandise
